headline: Malaysian Gaming Industry Revenue Hits RM4.2 Billion
context: Malaysia gaming industry including mobile PC and console generated RM4.2 billion in 2025 with 18 million active gamers.

cards.big: Malaysian gaming revenue hits RM4.2 billion with 18 million gamers
cards.sub: Industry grew 22% making gaming larger than cinema and music combined

cards.big: Mobile gaming accounts for 72% of revenue at RM3 billion in 2025
cards.sub: Average Malaysian gamer spends RM235 monthly on in-game purchases

cards.big: Only 28 Malaysian game studios versus 850 in South Korea
cards.sub: Local development talent lost to Singapore studios offering 3x salaries

cards.big: Government allocated RM28 million for game development grants in 2026
cards.sub: MyGameDev programme funded 45 indie studios producing local content

cards.big: Gaming industry tests whether Malaysia can capture development value not just consumption revenue
RM4.2 billion gaming industry revenue. Malaysia's creative economy needs IP protection and talent retention policies.
